products: Al Jazirah Falcon Company specializes in cooling, air conditioning, and home appliances of all types. The company owns five factories and operates more than fifteen showrooms across the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. It is structured into three main sectors, each distinguished by its area of specialization. The Industrial Sector is responsible for the manufacturing of the company’s products, such as cooling and air conditioning systems. This sector encompasses factories, production lines, technology, research and development (R&D), and quality assurance. The Commercial Sector is dedicated to all business and commercial operations, including the sale of products under our own brands as well as authorized agencies. It covers marketing, sales, product distribution, management of the dealer network, and the strengthening of commercial relationships with customers and partners. details: Nill Building Solutions is revolutionizing the way builders think about structural attachments. We specialize in patented, high-performance fasteners and mounts that redefine the standards of waterproofing, structural integrity, and efficiency. With decades of industry experience and a deep-rooted legacy in waterproofing and building, our founder, Lance Nill—a third-generation waterproofer—developed a groundbreaking line of attachment solutions designed to solve the industry's most persistent challenges, Water Intrusion. Our patented technology provides a reliable, modular point of attachment that increases strength, ensures watertight seals, and allows for easy installation—without compromising the integrity of the building envelope. Whether it's for glass railings, solar panels, facades, windows, doors, posts or any other key structural connections, Nill’s attachment solutions eliminate the outdated and damaging methods of using screws, nails, and adhesives that lead to structural failures and costly maintenance.

details: Samjung is the world’s largest manufacturer of steel pallets for concrete block production, headquartered in Pohang, South Korea. We specialize in advanced production boards under three main product lines: WowBoard, MetaBoard, and AlphaBoard. Our WowBoard is a traditional steel pallet that can be made with various material options, including corrosion-resistant steel grades tailored for block production. MetaBoard is our premium, lightweight option—60% the weight of traditional pallets—yet fully compatible with existing steel pallet lines. AlphaBoard is designed for customers using wooden or plastic boards, providing superior vibration transmission and durability. Both MetaBoard and AlphaBoard are the industry’s first carbon-neutral production boards, aligning with global sustainability goals. With a presence in over 90 countries, Samjung continues to lead the industry through innovation, flexibility, and environmental responsibility.
